description:
Flux.2 [Max] is Black Forest Labs' latest, state-of-the-art model with multi-reference support, fine-grained text rendering, and other features. 

Notes:
Supports structured JSON prompts, and allows use of hex colour codes within the prompt for precise colouring.  
Send images (Up to 8 images) in jpeg/png/webp format for editing.

Optional parameters:
- Set aspect ratio. Select from (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16). It is set to 4:3 aspect ratio as default.
